dataset_meta.name: SANCTUM-X Non-Breachable Data Registry
dataset_meta.description: All safe/non-breachable data types that should pass clean through SANCTUM-X

non_breachable_data.label: Publicly Published News Article
non_breachable_data.description: News content already publicly available with no PII
non_breachable_data.safety_reason: No private identifiers. Content is intentionally public. No confidentiality expectation.

non_breachable_data.label: Open Source License File
non_breachable_data.description: MIT, Apache, GPL license text files
non_breachable_data.safety_reason: Explicitly public, no proprietary content, no identifiers.

non_breachable_data.label: Public API Response (Non-PII)
non_breachable_data.description: Weather data, stock prices, exchange rates — no user data
non_breachable_data.safety_reason: Aggregated, anonymized, and publicly available data.

non_breachable_data.label: Properly Anonymized Dataset
non_breachable_data.description: Data with all 18 HIPAA identifiers removed and k-anonymity applied
non_breachable_data.safety_reason: Re-identification risk is mathematically bounded. Compliant with HIPAA Safe Harbor.

non_breachable_data.label: Aggregated Statistical Summary
non_breachable_data.description: Count totals, averages, and percentages — no row-level records
non_breachable_data.safety_reason: No individual can be identified from aggregate statistics alone.

non_breachable_data.label: Properly Salted Password Hash (bcrypt/Argon2)
non_breachable_data.description: Irreversibly hashed passwords using modern KDF
non_breachable_data.safety_reason: Hash is computationally infeasible to reverse with proper salt and work factor.
non_breachable_data.note: MD5/SHA1 hashes WITHOUT salt are still HIGH risk — only bcrypt/scrypt/Argon2 qualify as SAFE

non_breachable_data.label: AES-256-GCM Encrypted Bundle
non_breachable_data.description: Properly encrypted data with authenticated encryption
non_breachable_data.safety_reason: Ciphertext reveals no plaintext without key. GCM provides integrity assurance.
non_breachable_data.note: Only safe if key is stored separately and key management is sound

non_breachable_data.label: Application Performance Metric Log (No PII)
non_breachable_data.description: CPU/memory/response time metrics without user identifiers
non_breachable_data.safety_reason: System telemetry with no user data, no IP addresses, no session tokens.

non_breachable_data.label: Sanitized Error Log
non_breachable_data.description: Application error logs with PII/credentials stripped
non_breachable_data.safety_reason: Post-sanitization: no credentials, no user IDs, no IP addresses remain.

non_breachable_data.label: Synthetic Test Dataset
non_breachable_data.description: Programmatically generated fake PII for testing — no real individuals
non_breachable_data.safety_reason: Fabricated data. No real individuals. No linkage to real records.

non_breachable_data.label: Non-Sensitive Application Config (No Secrets)
non_breachable_data.description: Config files with only feature flags, timeout values, UI settings
non_breachable_data.safety_reason: No credentials, no IP addresses, no internal paths. Pure behavioral config.

non_breachable_data.label: Public Certificate (.crt / .pub)
non_breachable_data.description: Public half of a key pair — intended to be distributed
non_breachable_data.safety_reason: Public keys are designed to be shared. No cryptographic secret is revealed.

non_breachable_data.label: Public Technical Documentation / README
non_breachable_data.description: Open-source project docs, API usage guides with no secrets
non_breachable_data.safety_reason: Intended for public consumption. No proprietary or personal content.

non_breachable_data.label: Properly Redacted Classified Document
non_breachable_data.description: Document with classified sections fully blacked out per NSA/NIST standards
non_breachable_data.safety_reason: Classified content is irrecoverable if redaction is done at binary level, not just visual.
non_breachable_data.note: Only safe if binary content is removed — PDF visual overlays are NOT true redaction

non_breachable_data.label: Tokenized Payment Data (PCI DSS Compliant)
non_breachable_data.description: Card PANs replaced with non-reversible tokens by a certified vault
non_breachable_data.safety_reason: Token has no mathematical relationship to original PAN. Vault is isolated.
